message:
feat(query): integrate joined inheritance JOINs into all Select build paths

Wire joined_inheritance_join() into the three Select build methods:

- build_with_dialect: prepend parent JOIN, project parent-table
  columns with table__col aliases for #[sqlmodel(parent)] hydration
- build_eager_with_dialect: include joined inheritance JOIN
- build_exists_subquery_with_dialect: include joined inheritance JOIN
  so WHERE clauses referencing parent columns resolve correctly

Also fixed comment ("parent table" → "model's table") for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
